title: Get result details
content:
Use this endpoint to get rule execution results by execution IDs. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path| /v1.2/optimizer/rule/result/get/| /v1.3/optimizer/rule/result/get/| |Request parameter data type |`advertiser_id`: number
`exec_id`: number
`rule_id`: number |`advertiser_id`: string
`exec_id`: string
`rule_id`: string | |Response parameter data type|`rule_id`: number
`exec_id`: number
` object_dimension_id`: number |`rule_id`: string
`exec_id`: string
` object_dimension_id`: string| ``` ## Request **Endpoint** **Method** GET **Header** ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| |Content-Type {required}|string|Request message type
Allowed format: `"application/json"`. | ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |advertiser_id {required}|string| Advertiser ID. | |result_detail {required}|object[]| Result details.| #|exec_id {required}|string| Rule execution ID.| #|rule_id {required}|string| Rule ID.| |lang|string|Language of the execution results. Enum values: `ZH` (Simplified Chinese), `EN` (English)(default), `JA` (Japanese).| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code JSON JSON) { "advertiser_id": 75960823018, "result_detail":[ { "exec_id":6983900294136463361, "rule_id":6982553361971232769 }, { "exec_id":6983908036217667585, "rule_id":6982553361971232769 } ], "lang":"EN" } (/code) ``` ## Response ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |request_id|string| Unique ID of the request.| |data|object|Returned data.| #|result_details|object[]|Result details.| ##|rule_id|string| Rule ID.| ##|exec_id|string| Rule execution ID.| ##|action_subject_type| string| Action type. Enum values: `TURN_ON`, `TURN_OFF`, `MESSAGE`.| ##|status|string|Action status. Enum values: `SUCCESS`, `FAIL`| ##|error_message|string| If the action failed, this field returns the error message.| ##|object_dimension|string| Category of the object. Enum values: `CAMPAIGN`, `ADGROUP`, `AD`.| ##|object_dimension_id|string|Object ID.| ##|object_name|string|Object name.| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code JSON JSON) { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "2021072907015001024501602704097351", "data": { "result_details": [ { "object_dimension_id": 1695172996977714, "rule_id": 6982553361971232769, "status": "SUCCESS", "object_name": "20210324192339", "action_subject_type": "MESSAGE", "exec_id": 6983900294136463361, "object_dimension": "CAMPAIGN" }, { "object_dimension_id": 1695172996977714, "rule_id": 6982553361971232769, "status": "SUCCESS", "object_name": "20210324192339", "action_subject_type": "MESSAGE", "exec_id": 6983908036217667585, "object_dimension": "CAMPAIGN" } ] } } (/code) ```
